transcript: Hey hey, fellow Breakpointers, how are you? Doing great? My name is Vlad and I'm co-founder of Watt Protocol. And today I'm gonna show you what's wrong with current staking and tell you how you can liquid stake your Solana tokens in a better way. But first, let's state some obvious facts. So, majority of current staking programs are based on token emissions, which is basically a money printer. Because holders get diluted and those who don't stake carry the heaviest burden of the dilution. Next, I believe that majority of you put your stablecoins and SOL into some DeFi protocol to make it work. But you should treat your tokens in a very same way. I believe that's not the case, at least for now, because if you look at the numbers and if you sum up the market cap of tokens that don't have any staking program, you come up to billions of dollars, which is a huge capital inefficiency, of course. And lastly, um, it's all about volatility, right, in the markets. And the word volatility has a little bit negative connotation. Um, we see it as price spikes up and down, you know the mood swings between buying a new Lambo and applying for McDonald's. But, what if I tell you that you can do better? You can in fact earn whether the price goes up or down. It doesn't matter. And that's because we shipped a solution for liquid staking for tokens. Right now, you can earn real non-dilutive yield based on market activity on basically any token. Uh, you are exposed to the price upside while not facing the liquidation risk, impermanent loss, and also having no lockups. The great thing is that all this is already on mainnet, you can try it for yourself. We are developing another version, an advancement in the protocol. We will be listing new tokens. So, don't hesitate, try it for yourself. And if you have a token, I would like to speak to you today, so catch me here around. Thank you very much.

enrichment.generated_query: Watt Protocol Superteam Demo Day: Watt Protocol Breakpoint 2025 announcement

*For the first time, the world's most strategic assets—AI supercomputing centers, strategic real estate and critical energy assets—are crossing the threshold into programmable digital markets.*
NEW YORK,Dec. 8, 2025/PRNewswire/ -- The global economy is entering a new era where competitive advantage is defined not by access to capital alone, but by control of computational power, sovereign data, and the infrastructure that fuels modern civilization. Today, Abstract and Open World announce a landmark partnership to build the world's first national-scale real-world asset (RWA)tokenizationengine, capable of bringing the planet's most valuable physical assets onto a next-generation, quantum-resistant zero-knowledge (ZK) blockchain anchored toEthereum.
For decades, the planet's most valuable assets have existed beyond the reach of modern digital markets. Hyperscale AI megacenters humming with the densest clusters of NVIDIA's most advanced GPUs. Oil fields that fuel nations strategic national infrastructure. Energy grids, industrial complexes, sovereign reserves—all immense in value, yet trapped inside analog capital structures accessible only to a narrow band of global institutions.
Now, for the first time, these assets are stepping into the digital world and accessible to mainstream global investors.
AI megacenters and national energy reserves can be represented as tokenized Blue Chip real-world assets—unlocking liquidity, enabling compliant fractional ownership, and giving governments, regulated central organizations, and enterprises unprecedented control over how capital forms, moves, and interacts with their most strategic physical infrastructure and assets.
**The Infrastructure: An Enterprise-Grade, Quantum-Resistant ZK Blockchain**
At the center of this transformation will be Abstract's next-generation, quantum-resistant ZK blockchain, backed by leading technology investors, including Peter Thiel's Founders Fund, demonstrating how advanced blockchain technologies will enable new forms oftokenizationby sovereign nations and enterprises operating at global scale.
Unlike legacy blockchains that expose data, or permissioned chains controlled by small validator groups, Abstract aims to deliver the scale, privacy, and decentralization guarantees required for trillion-dollar capital systems:
* Over 10,000 TPS throughput
* Low cost per transaction ($0.001)
* Zero-knowledge cryptography for user and data privacy
* Embedded policy contro

sources.title: The Agentic Economy is Coming to Sui as Agentic Finance Protocol, Beep, Emerges from Stealth
sources.snippet:
The Agentic Economy is Coming to Sui as Agentic Finance Protocol, Beep, Emerges from Stealth
[![The Sui Blog](https://blog.sui.io/content/images/2023/04/SuiFoundation_Logo_DarkBlue-1.png)](https://blog.sui.io)
[News](https://blog.sui.io/tag/news/)
# The Agentic Economy is Coming to Sui as Agentic Finance Protocol, Beep, Emerges from Stealth
The world’s largest AI models can now remote control DeFi via Sui’s first agentic wallet framework, Beep.
* [![Sui Foundation](https://blog.sui.io/content/images/size/w100/2023/04/Sui_Droplet_Logo_Blue-3.png)](https://blog.sui.io/author/sui-foundation/)
#### [Sui Foundation](https://blog.sui.io/author/sui-foundation/)
06 Nov 2025•2 min read
![The Agentic Economy is Coming to Sui as Agentic Finance Protocol, Beep, Emerges from Stealth](https://blog.sui.io/content/images/size/w2000/2025/11/11-03_Blog_Beep_-The-Agentic-Wallet.png)
[Beep](https://justbeep.it/?ref=blog.sui.io), Sui’s first agentic wallet and finance protocol, launches its open beta today, with Sui as its exclusive blockchain partner. Beep on Sui delivers the first agent-native and stablecoin-native payment platform for developers, where AI agents can create, authorize, and settle payments in milliseconds, globally, for free.
With today’s launch, developers will immediately gain access to the top six foundation AI models, including[Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/?ref=blog.sui.io),[GPT-5](https://openai.com/gpt-5/?ref=blog.sui.io),[Claude](https://claude.ai/?ref=blog.sui.io),[Grok](https://x.ai/grok?ref=blog.sui.io),[Qwen](https://qwen.ai/home?ref=blog.sui.io), and[DeepSeek](https://www.deepseek.com/?ref=blog.sui.io). As the first agentic wallet on Sui, Beep creates a firm linkage between the world’s most powerful foundation models and the world’s fastest, most composable blockchain.
## Agentic DeFi unlocked
Today’s public beta grants consumer access to Beep’s conversational UI, offering smart money you can talk to. Beep can execute trades simultaneously using different models, optimize treasury yield, or perform cross-border payments, all settled in USDC instantly with zero fees.
For developers, Beep features:
* **Agentic payments**: an intelligent payment SDK and developer tooling for applications, games, and agents.
* **Agentic treasury, a first in the Sui ecosystem**: a non-custodial agentic yield system where you can deploy financial agents that scan, score, allocate, and auto-compound yield on your behalf.
* **Access to the a402 protocol**: an open protocol designed for tools, APIs, and AI agents, compatible with modern agent protocols including MCP, A2A and AP2.## The convergence of agentic finance and onchain optimization
Unlike traditional payment systems built for humans and credit cards, Beep is designed for AI agents: software entities that transact at speeds and volumes beyond human capacity. This requires streaming microtransactions, continuous programmability, and composable, API-driven interactions.
Sui’s architecture, particularly its parallel execution engine and native object model, is built to support exactly that. Developers building agentic products can rely on Beep and Sui to facilitate near-instant payments across agents, AIs, and APIs, while maintaining security and cost-efficiency.
“Beep is building the Stripe of the agentic economy, and Sui is the only chain that can handle the technical demands of that future,” said Adeniyi Abiodun, Co-Founder and CPO of Mysten Labs. “With its blazing speed, deterministic finality, and asset-native design, Sui offers the only infrastructure capable of supporting the real-time, high-volume micropayments that Beep makes possible.”
“We’re building the agentic wallet and finance protocol for the agentic economy,” said Arpan Nanavati, CEO of Beep. “Our platform requires a chain that doesn’t flinch at millions of microtransactions and lets us stream payments with precision. After evaluating multiple blockchains, Sui’s scalability and AI-developer-first tools gives us

*Nest vaults with assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal and issuers including Securitize and SuperState mark the beginning of a new yield economy forSolana.*
NEW YORK,Dec. 5, 2025/PRNewswire/ --[Plume](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=1349188964&u=https://plume.org/&a=Plume), the leading RWA blockchain powering real-world yield, today announced the launch of five RWA Nest vaults onSolana, setting real-world yield as a new base layer for the ecosystem and marking an important first step in Plume's multichain expansion for Nest.
Launching the vaults natively onSolanagives users direct investment opportunities to institutional-grade assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal, and issuers including Securitize and SuperState.Solanausers can natively access onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables and the ability to earn institutional-grade real-world yield.
With the launch of nBASIS, nOPAL, nWISDOM, nALPHA and nTBILL Vaults,Solana's 20+ million users can soon deposit stablecoins natively into Nest to unlock reliable, stable, real-world APY. Each deposit returns a Nest vaulttoken, a liquid, yield-bearing asset that accrues value over time and can move seamlessly acrossSolanaDeFi, from DEX liquidity pools to lending and structured products, with the ability to redeem at any point.
As part of this integration, Plume is also launching a deep partnership with[Squads Lab](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=2271106279&u=https://squads.xyz/&a=Squads+Lab),Solana's leading multi-sig and treasury management infrastructure provider. Plume will introduce its RWA yield pipelines across the Squads ecosystem, including a bespoke vault integrated for Altitude users and seamless RWA yield access for developers building with Grid.
*"Cryptois moving past the era of synthetic yield and into a market grounded in real economics. Stablecoins brought millions intocrypto, but yieldcoins will keep them here. This integration withSolanais the next step in building a transparent, programmable financial system at scale."*said Teddy Pornprinya, Co-Founder and CBO at Plume.
*"Plume already anchors over half of the industry's RWA activity, andSolanahas become one of the most efficient, high-throughput environments incrypto, making it a natural home for onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables. Bringing our strengths together is how we unlock the next phase of onchain finan*ce".
By introducing institutional RWAs at scale, Plume is expanding theSolanaDeFiecosystem with sustainable, composable yield infrastructure that can underpin the next generation ofSolana-native financial applications.
Solanausers can instantly access boosted yield opportunities with Nest.
The Plume Nest Points Program is a rewards framework designed to turn participation into ownership. Users can earn Plume Nest Points by holding and using Nest vault tokens. The more users hold and deploy, the more they earn as part of the Season One program.
Solanausers will also soon unlock boosted yield opportunities with direct access to lending markets on Loopscale. These platform integrations allow leverage

tags.impact_reason: Watt Protocol's liquid staking solution for tokens on Solana offers a novel approach to generating yield but is still a demo day presentation, limiting its immediate impact.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic plasma reactor as the Semantic Anchor because the name 'Watt Protocol' implies energy and power. The contained, chaotic plasma visually represents the 'market volatility' the protocol harnesses. The integrated text '↑↓ YIELD' is a diegetic holographic display, concisely communicating the core value proposition: generating yield whether the market goes up or down. This captures the essence of 'volatility farming' in a high-tech, conceptual style.
visual_idea.description: An extreme macro shot focusing on the core of the plasma reactor. The frame is filled with the swirling, chaotic energy of the blue and magenta plasma. Wisps and arcs of pure light twist and collide behind the crystal-clear containment field. The hard, reflective edges of the obsidian casing frame the chaotic light, creating a powerful contrast between the wild energy and the technology containing it.

final_prompt.prompt_text: An extreme macro shot focusing on the core of the plasma reactor. The frame is completely filled with the swirling, chaotic energy of vibrant, luminescent blue and magenta plasma, exhibiting dynamic wisps and brilliant arcs of pure light twisting and colliding with an intense, almost holographic, internal glow behind a crystal-clear containment field. The containment field itself showcases glossy reflections and subtle refractions, embodying a futuristic glassmorphism aesthetic. The hard, polished, reflective edges of the obsidian casing tightly frame this chaotic light, creating a powerful, high-contrast visual between the wild, raw energy and the sleek, advanced technology containing it. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and centrally focused, with an extreme macro perspective that fills the entire 1:1 square frame, showcasing intricate textures and hyper-detailed components. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, volumetric lighting, photorealistic, sci-fi aesthetic, studio render.

editorial.headline: Watt Protocol Unlocks "Volatility Farming" for Any Solana Token
editorial.standfirst: New "Universal Liquid Staking" primitive turns market turbulence into non-dilutive yield for billions in idle SPL assets, moving beyond the emission-based "money printer" model.
key_takeaways: Universal Liquid Staking: Enables yield generation on any SPL token—memecoins, governance, or utility—without native staking rewards.
Volatility Farming: Generates real yield from market arbitrage and price action (up or down) rather than inflationary token emissions.
Capital Efficiency: Targets the billions in dormant market cap sitting in wallets, offering upside exposure with zero liquidation risk or lockups.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a crowded DeFi landscape dominated by inflationary rewards, **Watt Protocol** has introduced a contrarian primitive: **Universal Liquid Staking**. Presented by co-founder **Vladimir Picha** at Superteam Demo Day, the protocol addresses a structural inefficiency in the Solana ecosystem—billions of dollars in token market cap sit idle, earning nothing. While liquid staking is standard for L1 assets like SOL, the long tail of SPL tokens (governance, utility, and meme assets) has historically lacked a mechanism to generate yield without suffering impermanent loss in liquidity pools.

Watt’s solution is a mechanism Picha terms **"Volatility Farming."** unlike traditional staking models that rely on "money printer" emissions—which dilute non-stakers—Watt derives yield from market activity itself. By wrapping tokens into liquid-staked Watt assets, holders capture value from arbitrage and price volatility. Crucially, this strategy is market-neutral; it generates returns whether the asset's price spikes or crashes, effectively monetizing the "mood swings" of the market without exposing the principal to liquidation risks or the lock-up periods typical of governance staking.

For institutional investors and treasuries, this represents a significant shift in capital efficiency. The protocol allows assets to remain liquid and composable while accreting value, turning dormant portfolio allocations into productive capital. Picha confirmed the protocol is live on **Mainnet**, signaling that the infrastructure for this "volatility-as-yield" layer is operational. As the market matures, the ability to extract non-dilutive yield from pure price action could become a standard requirement for holding any significant token position on Solana.
